series_metadata.series_description: File containing records that list all equipment including the description, date purchased, cost, vendor, and serial number (if any) along with miscellaneous information. Records may include: Records of Transfer of Equipment and Furniture; Equipment Receipt, inventories, disposal of surplus property records; maintenance, repair and warranty repair; and any additional records relating to inventory control.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: records life of equipment, two (2) state fiscal years. ; Electronic: records life of equipment, two (2) state fiscal years
